items.title: [Latest] Global DNS Service Market Size/Share Worth USD 27,143 Million by 2033 at a 16.35% CAGR: Custom Market Insights (Analysis, Outlook, Leaders, Report, Trends, Forecast, Segmentation, Growth, Growth Rate, Value)
items.author: Custom Market Insights
items.description: The global Domain Name System (DNS) Service market is expected to grow from $5.1 billion in 2023 to $27.1 billion by 2033, at a CAGR of 16.35%. The growth is driven by factors like digitalization, cloud computing, and expanding end-use industries.
